title: [RTL] Strength reduce and constant fold comparisons (Verilator lint)

features.name: comparison of 1-bit value with constant maximum
features.description: Code should include a 1-bit unsigned wire or logic compared to the constant 1'b1 using a less-than operator

features.name: comparison of zero-extended narrow value with zero
features.description: Code should include a comparison between a zero-extended expression and a zero constant, where the extended value can only be 0 or 1
